OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion:
Over the years, I've learned that managing conversations can be tricky if you're not sure what to say. Like right now, people are talking a lot about COVID vaccines because folks like me need to stay safe so we don't get sick when out cleaning homes. My upper secondary education means I understand basic science but not too much on this new stuff—just enough to know it's serious business.

I'm Christian and believe in God healing us, which sometimes conflicts with what doctors say about vaccines. But at my age, 87 years old now living alone except for visiting family from children, staying healthy is key so I listen carefully when someone explains things properly.

My low agreeableness score makes me firm if I think vaccines are necessary; don't argue because then the discussion could go sour quickly. High neuroticism means anxious about health changes—so I'm careful with my words around topics that touch on sickness and prevention measures.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: I thought carefully about how to handle this sensitive topic given who I am—87 years old, Christian beliefs influencing views on medicine versus divine healing, low agreeableness meaning I should be direct without being rude or confrontational when discussing vaccines. High neuroticism makes me cautious not to spread misinformation due to my anxiety about health issues.
response_parsed.tone: Serious yet grounded in personal experience and faith
